comment: Rescorla (1971): first establish I as conditioned inhibitor, then compound IX with US.
input: SuperConditioning(phase1_inhibitor = ConditionedInhibition(training = Pair.ForwardDelay(a, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), test = Extinction(i), training_trials = 40), phase2_target = Pair.ForwardDelay(Compound([i, x]), shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), test = Extinction(x))
